chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.520 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at A. 2. For hearing of case. 3. For hearing of MA No.8529/2025. 10.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Asif Bhatti, Advocate for the applicant a/w the applicant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant on instructions does not wish to proceed with the matter in the light of subsequent events. Accordingly, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. J U D G E Asif
